SELLUM

Crafting minimalist tools for complex ecosystems. We design and build high-performance software architecture that prioritizes structural integrity, clarity, and the rhythmic use of functional space.

Portfolio

PROJECTS 01-06

KaloSnap

The automated food journal for busy people. Log your meals in a second with a single photo, free from tedious tracking.

Weekly trading signals powered by Deep Learning LSTM models and macro regime analysis. More information, less noise.
